bad indentation of a.solution: Fix the indentation in list items - make sure arrays use consistent indentation with 2 spaces per level. Change '- industry: value' to have proper indentation.

duplicated mapping key.solution: Remove or rename duplicate keys in the YAML document. Most commonly seen with 'description' appearing twice in the same section.

can not read a block mapping entry; a mu.message: can not read a block mapping entry; a multiline key may not be an implicit key
can not read a block mapping entry; a mu.solution: Check for empty lines or improper indentation in nested structures. This often occurs when there's a blank line or an object property with missing value.

end of the stream or a document separato.message: end of the stream or a document separator is expected
end of the stream or a document separato.solution: The document is expecting another --- separator or the end of the file. Check for improper indentation or missing property values in the YAML structure.

expected <block end>, but found '<block.message: expected <block end>, but found '<block mapping start>'
expected <block end>, but found '<block.solution: This occurs when a nested YAML structure is improperly formed. The typical solution is to ensure proper indentation and structure for nested objects. Use proper list format for arrays and ensure that properties of nested objects have appropriate indentation.

expected <block end>, but found '-'.solution: This occurs when a list item (-) appears in an unexpected place. The solution is to properly nest list items under a parent key with correct indentation. Ensure that array items are properly grouped under a parent property.

missing colon after property name.solution: Add missing colon and an empty value placeholder after property names

improper list item indentation in nested.message: improper list item indentation in nested lists
improper list item indentation in nested.solution: Add proper indentation to list item properties by ensuring properties under a list item are indented more than the item itself

property with value on next line after e.message: property with value on next line after empty object
property with value on next line after e.solution: Fix alignment of property values that appear on the next line after an empty object placeholder

missing dash in consecutive list items.message: missing dash in consecutive list items
missing dash in consecutive list items.solution: Add missing dash (-) to list items that should be part of a sequence but are formatted as regular properties

no frontmatter found despite file having.message: No frontmatter found in file despite having YAML delimiters
no frontmatter found despite file having.solution: This is often caused by duplicate delimiter issues (multiple --- at the start of the file) or missing closing delimiters. Run the fix_duplicate_delimiters.py script to automatically fix these issues.

duplicate frontmatter delimiters.message: File has duplicate frontmatter delimiters at the beginning
duplicate frontmatter delimiters.solution: Remove the duplicate delimiter line (---) at the beginning of the file. The correct format should have exactly two delimiter lines: one at the beginning and one at the end of the frontmatter section.
